title: remove LinearSolve version constraint

body: This PR adds one more example of where dss fails inference.
title: Add a dss inference failure test

body: This PR defines `parent_array_type` for ReshapedArray, which is needed in RRTMGP to convert between fields and arrays. At the moment, ClimaAtmos pirates this method for this definition.
title: Define `parent_array_type` for ReshapedArray

body: This PR removes `tuplemap`, which was shown to improve inference in #1306. Perhaps we should just get rid of it?
title: Remove tuplemap
